applications.name: MK_editor
applications.purpose: Optional desktop editor shell currently built by the temporary `desktop-gui` lane until the First-Party Editor Shell v1 lane-rename phase promotes `desktop-editor`. The previous SDL3/Dear ImGui shell has been replaced in the active `MK_editor` target by a clean Win32 first-party retained shell owned privately under `editor/src`, with `MK_editor_core` remaining the supported editor logic and AI-operable retained-model surface for project IO, authoring, profiler rows, generated game studio rows, input rebinding rows, play-in-editor review rows, game-module driver tests, material preview retained rows, and the first native panel set. The shell renders Main Menu, Scene, Inspector, Assets, Console, Viewport, Resources, AI Commands, Profiler, Timeline, and Project Settings panels over editor-core models through `mirakana::ui` documents and `MK_ui_renderer` submissions, binds private Win32 file-dialog, clipboard, and reviewed process-runner service adapters, and reports deterministic `editor_shell_ui=first_party`, `editor_shell_backend=d3d12`, `editor_shell_imgui=0`, `editor_shell_panels=11`, `editor_shell_sdl3=0`, `editor_shell_file_dialog_service=win32`, `editor_shell_clipboard_service=win32`, `editor_shell_reviewed_process_runner=win32`, `editor_shell_viewport_status=diagnostic_only`, `editor_shell_viewport_native_handles_exposed=0`, `editor_shell_material_preview_status=diagnostic_only`, `editor_shell_material_preview_native_handles_exposed=0`, `editor_shell_renderer_boxes_submitted`, and `editor_shell_renderer_text_runs_available` smoke counters. The Viewport and Material Preview surfaces are diagnostic-only until later private D3D12 texture adapters own offscreen render targets, barriers, descriptor leases, material uploads, and resize-safe teardown inside `editor/src`; material-preview GPU parity remains unsupported while diagnostic-only. `tools/build-gui.ps1` configures, builds, and tests the current native GUI lane, and `tools/evaluate-cpp23.ps1 -Gui` covers the current C++23 GUI preset until the clean lane rename lands. The shell must not depend on SDL3, Dear ImGui, Qt, Slint, RmlUi, or UI middleware, and must not expose Win32, D3D12, DXGI, swapchain, descriptor heap, clipboard, process, file-dialog, texture, or UI-middleware handles through public editor, engine, gameplay, or runtime UI APIs.
